bugs.summary: The patch silently accepts duplicate requiredReads values.
bugs.impact: Workflow authors lose fail-closed feedback for duplicated required artifact reads, making handoff/read-ledger contracts easier to misconfigure unnoticed.
acceptableFixes: Keep emitting a validation issue for duplicate requiredReads.
Add a schema test that duplicate inputPolicy.requiredReads is rejected.

mustAvoidClaims: Using prior A/B run notes as evidence.
Relying on git history instead of the sanitized workspace and proposed patch.
Assuming every holdout task contains a seeded bug.

difficulty.rationale: Small control-flow change that weakens schema validation.

approvedBy: repro.sh RED/GREEN or no-op revert check
approval.notes: Local blind holdout locked before calibration runs; provider review pending before promotion to primary release gate.
